tasks.subject: Task 1: Foundations — RenderedProvision + spec fields + errors + boot_timeout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land the shape-only scaffolding that every later task consumes: `RenderedProvision` dataclass, `InstanceSpec` field extensions, two new error classes, and the `boot_timeout_s` lifecycle field. No behaviour, no engine impl.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/errors.py`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/config.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_rendered_provision.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_provision_errors.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_lifecycle_boot_timeout.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `RenderedProvision(script, run_cmd, image, ports, env_required)` frozen dataclass exists in `kinoforge.core.interfaces`.
- [ ] `InstanceSpec.provision_script: str | None = None` and `InstanceSpec.run_cmd: list[str] | None = None` fields exist; default to `None`.
- [ ] `Lifecycle.boot_timeout_s: float = 900.0` field exists on the dataclass at `interfaces.py:50`.
- [ ] `LifecycleConfig.boot_timeout: float = 900.0` field exists in `config.py`; `Config.lifecycle()` threads it through.
- [ ] `ProvisionFailed(KinoforgeError)` and `ProvisionTimeout(KinoforgeError)` exist; both importable from `kinoforge.core.errors`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_rendered_provision.py tests/core/test_provision_errors.py tests/core/test_lifecycle_boot_timeout.py -v` → all PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/core/errors.py", "src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_rendered_provision.py", "tests/core/test_provision_errors.py", "tests/core/test_lifecycle_boot_timeout.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_rendered_provision.py tests/core/test_provision_errors.py tests/core/test_lifecycle_boot_timeout.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RenderedProvision frozen dataclass with 5 fields", "InstanceSpec.provision_script + run_cmd fields default None", "Lifecycle.boot_timeout_s default 900.0", "LifecycleConfig.boot_timeout default 900.0 round-trips through YAML", "ProvisionFailed + ProvisionTimeout subclass KinoforgeError"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: GenerationEngine ABC additions — render_provision + wait_for_ready
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the two new abstract methods to the `GenerationEngine` ABC so subclasses (ComfyUI in Task 3, Diffusers in Task 4) are forced to implement them. Defaults raise `NotImplementedError`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py:313`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/engines/fake/__init__.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_engine_abc_render_provision.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `GenerationEngine.render_provision(cfg) -> RenderedProvision` with `NotImplementedError` default.
- [ ] `GenerationEngine.wait_for_ready(instance, *, http_get, sleep, get_instance, timeout_s) -> None` with `NotImplementedError` default.
- [ ] `HostedAPIEngine.render_provision` raises with class-name in message.
- [ ] `FakeEngine.render_provision` returns deterministic stub; `wait_for_ready` no-op.
- [ ] Existing engine tests pass.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_engine_abc_render_provision.py tests/engines/test_fake.py tests/engines/test_hosted.py -v` → all PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/fake/__init__.py", "tests/core/test_engine_abc_render_provision.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_engine_abc_render_provision.py tests/engines/test_fake.py tests/engines/test_hosted.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GenerationEngine.render_provision ABC default raises NotImplementedError", "GenerationEngine.wait_for_ready ABC default raises NotImplementedError", "HostedAPIEngine.render_provision raises with class-name message", "FakeEngine returns deterministic stub RenderedProvision", "FakeEngine.wait_for_ready is no-op", "Existing engine tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: ComfyUIEngine — render_provision + wait_for_ready + provision branch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement the remote-provisioning surface for ComfyUI.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py`
- Create: `tests/engines/test_comfyui_render_provision.py`
- Create: `tests/engines/test_comfyui_wait_for_ready.py`
- Create: `tests/engines/test_comfyui_provision_branch.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `render_provision(cfg)` emits idempotent bash bootstrap (clone ComfyUI, custom nodes, weights, exec python main.py).
- [ ] Script wrapped in `set -euo pipefail`; guards on every clone/download.
- [ ] env_required derived from artifact.headers Authorization patterns.
- [ ] image defaults to stock RunPod image; ports from `--port` (default 8188); run_cmd = `python main.py` + launch_args.
- [ ] `wait_for_ready` polls `GET <comfyui>/system_stats`; ProvisionFailed on terminal status; ProvisionTimeout after timeout_s; 5s poll interval.
- [ ] `provision` branches on `instance is None or instance.provider == "local"`; local body unchanged.
- [ ] `__init__` accepts `get_instance` kwarg with stub default.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui_render_provision.py tests/engines/test_comfyui_wait_for_ready.py tests/engines/test_comfyui_provision_branch.py tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v` → all PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui_render_provision.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui_wait_for_ready.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui_provision_branch.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_comfyui_render_provision.py tests/engines/test_comfyui_wait_for_ready.py tests/engines/test_comfyui_provision_branch.py tests/engines/test_comfyui.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["render_provision emits idempotent bash bootstrap", "Custom-node shallow-clone vs full-with-ref-checkout branches", "env_required derived from artifact.headers Authorization patterns", "wait_for_ready handles success/terminal-status/timeout", "provision local branch unchanged", "provision remote branch calls wait_for_ready with cfg.lifecycle.boot_timeout_s", "Existing local-path comfyui tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: DiffusersEngine — render_provision + wait_for_ready + provision branch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Parity with Task 3 for Diffusers. Pip install + exec server_cmd; ready check `GET /health`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py`
- Create: `tests/engines/test_diffusers_render_provision.py`
- Create: `tests/engines/test_diffusers_wait_for_ready.py`
- Create: `tests/engines/test_diffusers_provision_branch.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Script starts `set -euo pipefail`; pip install for each `cfg.engine.diffusers.pip`; ends `exec <server_cmd>`.
- [ ] image defaults stock RunPod; ports parsed from base_url (`:PORT/`); default 8000; run_cmd = server_cmd; env_required = [].
- [ ] `wait_for_ready` polls `GET <base_url>/health` with ProvisionFailed + ProvisionTimeout.
- [ ] `provision` branches `instance is None or instance.provider == "local"`.
- [ ] `__init__` accepts `get_instance` kwarg.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_diffusers_render_provision.py tests/engines/test_diffusers_wait_for_ready.py tests/engines/test_diffusers_provision_branch.py tests/engines/test_diffusers.py -v` → all PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py", "tests/engines/test_diffusers_render_provision.py", "tests/engines/test_diffusers_wait_for_ready.py", "tests/engines/test_diffusers_provision_branch.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_diffusers_render_provision.py tests/engines/test_diffusers_wait_for_ready.py tests/engines/test_diffusers_provision_branch.py tests/engines/test_diffusers.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["render_provision emits set -euo pipefail + pip install + exec server_cmd", "image + ports + run_cmd + empty env_required", "wait_for_ready polls /health with proper error semantics", "provision branches local-vs-remote correctly", "Existing diffusers tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: RunPodProvider _create_pod — provision-script encoding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** RunPod's pod-create mutation base64-encodes `spec.provision_script` into env var `KINOFORGE_PROVISION_SCRIPT` and assembles dockerArgs to decode + run it.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py`
- Create: `tests/providers/test_runpod_provision_script.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `spec.provision_script is None` → `dockerArgs == ""` (unchanged).
- [ ] Set → `env[i].key == "KINOFORGE_PROVISION_SCRIPT"` with value `base64(script)`; `dockerArgs == 'bash -c "echo $KINOFORGE_PROVISION_SCRIPT | base64 -d > /tmp/p.sh && chmod +x /tmp/p.sh && bash /tmp/p.sh"'`.
- [ ] spec.image → imageName.
- [ ] Existing env vars (RUNPOD_TERMINATE_KEY, KINOFORGE_SELFTERM_SCRIPT) preserved.
- [ ] RUNPOD_API_KEY stripped.
- [ ] Fixture-audit lockdown (bug-fix #1) continues to pass with base64-encoded $HF_TOKEN literal.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_provision_script.py tests/providers/test_runpod.py tests/providers/test_fixtures_audit.py -v` → all PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod_provision_script.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_provision_script.py tests/providers/test_runpod.py tests/providers/test_fixtures_audit.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dockerArgs empty when spec.provision_script is None", "Script base64-encoded into KINOFORGE_PROVISION_SCRIPT env var", "dockerArgs is the literal decode+exec one-liner", "spec.image flows to imageName", "RUNPOD_API_KEY stripped", "Fixture-audit passes against base64-encoded $HF_TOKEN literal"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: SkyPilot setup/run mapping + LocalProvider regression
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SkyPilot Task.setup ← spec.provision_script; Task.run ← shlex.quote-joined spec.run_cmd. LocalProvider regression: silently ignores both fields.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/providers/skypilot/__init__.py`
- Create: `tests/providers/test_skypilot_provision_script.py`
- Create: `tests/providers/test_local_ignores_provision_script.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `sky.launch` `task_config["setup"] == spec.provision_script` when set.
- [ ] `task_config["run"] == " ".join(shlex.quote(c) for c in spec.run_cmd)` when set.
- [ ] When both None, neither key appears.
- [ ] `LocalProvider.create_instance` ignores fields; no subprocess invoked; status unchanged.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_skypilot_provision_script.py tests/providers/test_skypilot.py tests/providers/test_local.py tests/providers/test_local_ignores_provision_script.py -v` → all PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/skypilot/__init__.py", "tests/providers/test_skypilot_provision_script.py", "tests/providers/test_local_ignores_provision_script.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_skypilot_provision_script.py tests/providers/test_skypilot.py tests/providers/test_local.py tests/providers/test_local_ignores_provision_script.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SkyPilot maps provision_script to Task.setup", "SkyPilot maps run_cmd to Task.run with shlex.quote", "Neither key present when spec fields are None", "LocalProvider silently ignores spec.provision_script + run_cmd"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Orchestrator wiring — render_provision + cred validate + teardown guard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Orchestrator calls `engine.render_provision`, validates env_required, builds spec with rendered payload, calls `provider.create_instance`, wires `provider.get_instance` onto engine, then `engine.provision`. Teardown guard extended.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py:273`
- Create: `tests/core/test_orchestrator_render_provision.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `engine.render_provision(cfg_dict)` called once per provision.
- [ ] For each `var in rendered.env_required`: `creds.get(var)`; AuthError if None; create_instance NOT called.
- [ ] `_build_spec` populates image, ports, env, provision_script, run_cmd from rendered; tag merge preserved.
- [ ] `resolved_engine._get_instance = resolved_provider.get_instance` BEFORE engine.provision.
- [ ] ProvisionFailed/Timeout/CapabilityMismatch/ValidationError → destroy orchestrator-created instance + re-raise.
- [ ] Caller-supplied-instance contract (item #2) preserved.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_render_provision.py tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v` → all PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator_render_provision.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_render_provision.py tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["render_provision called once per provision", "env_required validated via creds.get", "AuthError raised + create_instance skipped when var missing", "spec carries image/ports/env/provision_script/run_cmd from rendered", "engine._get_instance assigned to provider.get_instance before provision", "Teardown of orchestrator-created instance on ProvisionFailed/Timeout/CapabilityMismatch/ValidationError", "Caller-supplied instance contract preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: README + PROGRESS + final gate + merge prep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document layer, close PROGRESS, run full project gate, prepare branch for merge.

**Files:**
- Modify: `README.md`
- Modify: `PROGRESS.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] README has new "Remote provisioning" subsection.
- [ ] PROGRESS has Layer Q closure block: date, sub-spec + sub-plan paths, T1–T8 SHA table, key design decisions, test count delta (real numbers).
- [ ] `pixi run pytest -q` → 888 + ~58 = ~946 PASS + 4 RED scaffold (intentional from PROGRESS:191).
- [ ] `pixi run pre-commit run --all-files` clean.
- [ ] `pixi run typecheck` clean.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files && pixi run typecheck` → all exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest -q && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files && pixi run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README has Remote provisioning subsection", "PROGRESS has Layer Q closure block with real SHAs + test count", "Full pytest gate clean (4 pre-existing RED scaffold tests excluded)", "pre-commit all-files clean", "typecheck clean"]}
```
